title: Start an AI Project
description: Take on a real AI project challenge

scenes.speech: Let's build a real AI project together! Let's take on the challenge!
scenes.title: Start an AI Project

scenes.speech: Thinking about what to build is the first step!
scenes.title: Finding Project Ideas
scenes.content: Find a problem → Think if AI can solve it → Set the project goal. Start with problems close to your life!

scenes.speech: Data is the lifeblood of AI projects!
scenes.title: Collecting Data
scenes.content: Kaggle, Google Dataset, Hugging Face have free datasets. You can also collect your own data!

scenes.speech: Choose AI tools that fit your goal!
scenes.title: Choosing Your Tools
scenes.content: Google Colab (Python environment), Teachable Machine (no-code), ChatGPT API (text AI)... choose by purpose!

scenes.speech: Build an image recognition AI without code!
scenes.title: Try Teachable Machine
scenes.content: Google's free 'Teachable Machine' tool lets you build an image recognition AI just by taking photos! Ready in 30 minutes!

scenes.speech: Embed ChatGPT in your own app!
scenes.title: Using ChatGPT API
scenes.content: Using OpenAI's API, you can integrate ChatGPT into your own programs. Just a little Python code gets it running!

scenes.title: Testing Your Project
scenes.content: Test if AI works correctly → Find why it's failing → Improve → Test again. This is what AI engineers do!

scenes.speech: Show the world what you built!
scenes.title: Presenting Your Project
scenes.content: Share your project on GitHub, dev.to, YouTube. Get feedback and apply it to your next project!

scenes.speech: The road to AI engineer has opened up!
scenes.title: Next Steps
scenes.content: Learn more Python, take machine learning courses, join Kaggle competitions... there are so many next steps!

scenes.speech: You've taken the first step toward your AI project! Wonderful!
scenes.title: Lesson Complete!
